description: As the Data Governance Manager at a management consulting firm, investigate and correct cross-module data integrity violations in SuiteCRM identified during a security audit that could affect regulatory reporting and client communications. Ensure Account type classifications align with opportunity history: accounts with at least one 'Closed Won' opportunity must be typed as 'Customer', while those without must not, unless they are accurately classified as 'Partner' or 'Competitor'. Reassign contacts linked to non-existent or deleted accounts to the correct accounts and ensure all contact account assignments match their email domains. Resolve all data integrity violations across the CRM.
